rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious User-Initiated Process Execution on External Drive (Old)

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious User-Initiated Process Execution on External Drive (Old)
id: 2a054382-98a1-4d96-b966-ded8e5aa3a65
status: experimental
description: Detects command/scripting interpreter-created processes executing on
  an external drive. This will detect common instances of malware using LNK files
  to obscure malicious commands for user execution. Commonly associated with QakBot
  and IcedID.
references:
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/html-smugglers-turn-to-svg-images/#:~:text=HTML%20smuggling%20is%20a%20technique,directly%20on%20the%20victim's%20device.
- Research and analysis performed off of QakBot intelligence gathered at https://github.com/pr0xylife/Qakbot
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/19
tags:
- attack.s0650
- attack.s0483
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1204
- attack.t1204.002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_explorer_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
  selection_cmd_scripting_interp:
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \wscript.exe
  filter_cwd:
    CurrentDirectory|startswith: 'C:'
  filter_external_exe:
    Image|startswith: 'C:'
  condition: selection_explorer_parent and (not filter_external_exe or (selection_cmd_scripting_interp
    and not filter_cwd))
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
